import '../styles/Menu.css' import absence from '../assets/absence.png' import employes from '../assets/employes.png' import presence from '../assets/presence.png' import graphique from '../assets/graphique.png' import { Link } from 'react-router' import supabase from './supabaseClient' import React, {useState, useEffect} from 'react' function Menu(){ const [pointage, setPointage]= useState([]) const [loading, setLoading]= useState(true) const [message, setMessage]= useState("") useEffect(()=> { async function fetchPointage() { const {data, error}= await supabase .from('USER_OF_RUN') .select(` USERID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, `) .limit(3) .order('STARTDATE', { ascending: false }) if(error){ setMessage('Erreur de récuperation :',error.message) }else{ setPointage(data) } setLoading(false) } fetchPointage() },[]) if(loading) return
